svg.title: IoTextra SSR Small overview
svg.desc: IoTextra SSR Small — 8-channel solid-state relay module overview with key specs
svg.text: 8-channel solid-state relay module · SPST-NO · galvanic isolation · 5000 VRMS · on-resistance from 0.05 Ω
GPIO and/or I²C modes · HOST and Qwiic connectors · 47×56 mm · 5 VDC supply
Part of the IoTextra series · compatible with IoTsmart and IoTbase · Open Hardware
